Kevin Hughey, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT, MORAN & ARNOLD 781-7900 for Petitioners and Plaintiffs BRIAN HINMAN and SUZANNE SKEES moving to augmentthe Administrative Record
Joel S. Jacobs, Deputy Attorney General 510/622-2136 for Respondent and Defendant CALIFORNIA COASTAL COMMISSION opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiff's Motion to Augment the Administrative Record: Granted as to the Monterey Pine Forest Reports and letter from Fisherman. If Plaintiffs do not get a letter from the fisherman or a declaration about the letter from the fisherman, then Carl's deposition will not be allowed in to augment the Administrative Record. Counsel will be notified about the date and time of the hearing on the writ. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
